info.name: Roomi — Goi Thoi Gian & Gan Phong (Complete)
info.description:
Collection kiem thu day du chuc nang: Xay dung va kiem tra goi thoi gian khi gan phong.
Luong chay: 0 (Setup) -> 1 (Happy Path) -> 2 (Khoang ngay sai) -> 3 (Thieu thong tin) -> 4 (Conflict lich) -> 5 (Sai trang thai) -> 6 (Calendar View) -> 7 (Seasonal Rate)
Base URL: http://localhost:8080
Yeu cau: Chay buoc 0 truoc de lay token va tao du lieu.

exec: // Tao booking moi cung ngay roi gan phong da bi dat

  "source": "WALK_IN",
  "_note": "checkIn = checkOut cua booking 1.1, day la TIEP GIAP — khong conflict"
}
